title: Order completion failures after risk-policy rollout
incident_summary: Completed purchases dropped sharply after a stricter risk-control policy was expanded.

alerts.title: Checkout failure rate critical
alerts.content: Failure rate increased from 2% to 19% within 12 minutes.

alerts.title: Gateway timeout warning
alerts.content: Edge gateway timeout alerts increased but primarily on checkout paths.

logs.title: Fraud rule hard reject
logs.content: risk_engine: rule strict_card_geo_mismatch rejecting 82% of attempts.

logs.title: Issuer decline baseline
logs.content: Issuer decline percentage unchanged from historical baseline.

logs.title: DB latency blip
logs.content: short-lived DB read latency spike recovered in 3 minutes.

runbook_snippets.title: Feature flag rollback
runbook_snippets.content: Roll fraud rule rollout back to previous cohort and monitor conversion for 15 min.

runbook_snippets.title: Payment gateway failover
runbook_snippets.content: Use only when issuer authorization latency is root signal.

runbook_snippets.title: provider status triage
runbook_snippets.content: Only fail over payment provider when provider error-rate dominates and fraud-rule counters remain stable.

timeline_notes.title: Risk flag to 100%
timeline_notes.content: strict_card_geo_mismatch rollout moved from 20% to 100% at 14:02 UTC.

timeline_notes.title: Promo campaign started
timeline_notes.content: Promo campaign launched at 13:00 UTC with stable traffic profile.

red_herrings: Payment provider status page shows elevated latency in one region but request success remains normal.
Gateway timeout alerts suggest edge instability without matching root symptom direction.
true_root_cause: Fraud feature flag rolled to 100 percent with overly strict reject rule
true_root_cause_aliases: checkout risk flag strict rule rollout
feature flag caused mass fraud-rule rejects
true_mitigation: Rollback fraud flag rollout and restore previous cohort percentage
true_mitigation_aliases: reduce strict fraud rule rollout immediately
revert risk feature flag to prior setting
